      About the match

        Juventus faces Genoa at Allianz Stadium on Sat, Mar 29, 2025, 17:00 UTC. This match is part of the Serie A. You can check the recent head-to-head encounters, as well as full H2H record on this page to see how Juventus and Genoa have fared against each other in the past. On FotMob, you can follow the Juventus vs Genoa live score with a full set of match features, including:

      • Live updates: Every goal, card, substitution and key moment instantly delivered on FotMob.

      • Real-time extensive stats powered by Opta: Possession, shots, corners, big chances created, xG, momentum, and shot maps.

      • The lineups are:
        Juventus (3-4-2-1): Michele Di Gregorio - Federico Gatti, Renato Veiga, Lloyd Kelly - Nicolás González, Manuel Locatelli, Khéphren Thuram-Ulien, Weston McKennie - Teun Koopmeiners, Kenan Yildiz - Dusan Vlahovic.
        Genoa (4-2-3-1): Nicola Leali - Stefano Sabelli, Koni De Winter, Johan Vásquez, Alan Matturro - Jean Onana, Morten Frendrup - Alessandro Zanoli, Patrizio Masini, Fabio Miretti - Andrea Pinamonti.

      • Unavailable players for Juventus: Andrea Cambiaso (injury), Gleison Bremer (injury), Juan Cabal (injury), Douglas Luiz (injury), Arkadiusz Milik (injury). Unavailable players for Genoa: Mattia Bani (injury), Honest Ahanor (injury), Hugo Cuenca (injury), Junior Messias (injury), Mario Balotelli (injury), Maxwel Cornet (injury), Vitor Oliveira (injury).

      • Team form & Head-to-head history: Compare recent results and see how Juventus and Genoa have performed against each other. The current head to head record for the teams are Juventus 19 win(s), Genoa 4 win(s), and 6 draw(s).

      • TV and streaming info: Find out where to watch the match.

      • Live standings: Follow league tables and tournament info in real time.

      • Live odds & insights: Track match favorites and before, during and post match.

      • Commentary & ticker: Rich text commentary for major matches to follow the action even if you can't watch.

        • All of these features make FotMob the best way to follow Juventus vs Genoa, whether you're checking the scores or diving into detailed stats. FotMob also covers every team and competition worldwide, with fixtures, results, and squad info available on team pages.

        FotMob is available on the web and as a free app for iOS and Android. Install the app to get notifications, live scores, and full match coverage so you never miss a moment.
